sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Aeva wins first defense contract to supply lidar for autonomous vehicles
feed.summary: Aeva Technologies, Inc. has secured its first defense contract, providing 4D LiDAR sensors and perception technology to Forterra for autonomous defense vehicles. This technology enhances environmental awareness and obstacle detection in challenging environments, validating Aeva's platform for demanding autonomous missions. The announcement highlights the growing adoption of advanced perception technologies within the defense sector.

feed.title: Nio ES8 delivery wait in China reduced to 13-14 weeks
feed.summary: Nio has significantly reduced the estimated delivery wait time for its ES8 SUV in China to 13-14 weeks, down from 24-26 weeks at its launch in September 2025. This reduction comes as the broader Chinese auto market enters a seasonal slowdown. The third-generation ES8 has seen substantial sales, becoming China's best-selling large SUV in December.

feed.title: Algonquin Power & Utilities (AQN) Upgraded by Analyst
feed.summary: National Bank has upgraded Algonquin Power & Utilities Corp. (NYSE: AQN) to 'Outperform' from 'Sector Perform', increasing its price target from $7 to $7.50. This upgrade is driven by anticipated approvals of the company's multiple rate cases in 2026, which are expected to boost EPS growth by approximately 10% in 2026 and over 20% in 2027. The analyst believes these rate cases will help Algonquin's valuation and return on equity align with its industry peers.

feed.title: Viatris launches heart failure drug Inpefa in UAE, first outside US
feed.summary: Viatris Inc. has announced the launch of its heart failure treatment, Inpefa (sotagliflozin), in the United Arab Emirates, marking its first commercialization outside the United States. This dual SGLT1/2 inhibitor is approved to reduce the risk of cardiovascular death and heart failure hospitalizations in adults with heart failure or type 2 diabetes. Viatris plans further international launches and acquired rights to the drug from Lexicon Pharmaceuticals, which has seen significant financial growth.

feed.title: SPY ETF Daily Update, 1/20/2026
feed.summary: The SPDR S&P 500 ETF Trust (SPY) declined by 1.49% in pre-market trading, possibly influenced by President Donald Trump's comments on Greenland. Despite this, SPY has seen $997 million in net inflows over the past five trading days and holds a "Moderate Buy" rating with a target price suggesting a 16.83% upside. The ETF's Smart Score of eight indicates potential outperformance in the long term.

feed.title: QRG Capital Management Inc. Has $2.57 Million Stake in Public Service Enterprise Group Incorporated $PEG
feed.summary: QRG Capital Management Inc. reduced its stake in Public Service Enterprise Group (NYSE:PEG) by 34.9% in Q3, now holding 30,819 shares valued at $2.57 million. Despite this reduction, other large institutions significantly increased their positions, leading to 73.34% institutional ownership. Public Service Enterprise Group also reported strong Q3 earnings, beating estimates with $1.13 EPS and increasing revenue by 22.1%.

feed.title: Fastenal shares fall 4% as Q4 revenue misses expectations By Investing.com
feed.summary: Fastenal Company's shares fell 4.21% in pre-market trading after its Q4 earnings met analyst expectations but revenue missed the consensus forecast. The industrial and construction supplies distributor reported earnings of $0.26 per share, with revenue at $2.03 billion, slightly below the $2.04 billion expected. Despite the revenue miss, the company saw an 11.1% increase from the prior year, driven by improved customer contract signings and growth in unit sales.

feed.title: Fifth Third reports rise in fourth-quarter profit on higher interest income
feed.summary: Fifth Third Bancorp reported a rise in fourth-quarter profit due to higher interest income driven by increased loan demand and a favorable economic environment. The bank's net interest income grew by 6%, and total loans by 5%, while its wealth and asset management revenue also saw significant growth. The report follows the Federal Reserve's approval of Fifth Third's $10.9 billion acquisition of Comerica.

feed.title: QRG Capital Management Inc. Lowers Position in Ulta Beauty Inc. $ULTA
feed.summary: QRG Capital Management Inc. significantly reduced its stake in Ulta Beauty Inc. by 80.2% in the third quarter, selling 17,527 shares and retaining 4,326 shares valued at $2.365 million. Despite this, Ulta Beauty exceeded quarterly earnings and revenue expectations, reporting EPS of $5.14 against an estimated $4.61 and revenue of $2.86 billion against an estimated $2.70 billion. The company maintains a "Moderate Buy" consensus analyst rating with an average price target of $607.64.

feed.title: QRG Capital Management Inc. Lowers Stake in T. Rowe Price Group, Inc. $TROW
feed.summary: QRG Capital Management Inc. significantly reduced its stake in T. Rowe Price Group (NASDAQ:TROW) by 49.9% in the third quarter of 2025, selling 16,726 shares and holding 16,791 shares valued at $1.72 million. Despite this, other institutions like First Trust Advisors and Norges Bank increased their holdings, with 73.39% of the stock now owned by institutional investors. Analysts generally maintain a "Reduce" rating with an average target price of $107.54, even though the company recently surpassed EPS estimates and offers a 4.8% annualized dividend.

feed.title: QRG Capital Management Inc. Trims Stake in Regency Centers Corporation $REG
feed.summary: QRG Capital Management Inc. significantly reduced its stake in Regency Centers Corporation (NASDAQ:REG) by 57.8% in the third quarter, selling 48,728 shares and ending with 35,601 shares valued at $2.595 million. Additionally, Chairman Martin E. Stein Jr. sold 15,000 shares for approximately $1.05 million, decreasing his holding by 5.21%. Despite insider selling and stake reductions by some institutional investors, Regency Centers raised its quarterly dividend to $0.755, yielding 4.2%, and the company's stock shows strong institutional ownership at 96.07%.

feed.title: QRG Capital Management Inc. Sells 13,618 Shares of Otis Worldwide Corporation $OTIS
feed.summary: QRG Capital Management Inc. has reduced its stake in Otis Worldwide Corporation (NYSE:OTIS) by selling 13,618 shares, leaving them with 21,396 shares worth approximately $1.956 million. This comes as Otis continues to perform well, beating analysts' quarterly EPS estimates and setting strong FY2025 guidance. The stock currently trades near $90, with a consensus price target of $104.13, and pays a quarterly dividend of $0.42.

feed.title: QRG Capital Management Inc. Increases Stock Position in Western Digital Corporation $WDC
feed.summary: QRG Capital Management Inc. significantly increased its stake in Western Digital Corporation ($WDC) by 375.1% in Q3, now holding 21,212 shares valued at $2.55 million. This comes as Western Digital exceeded Q3 earnings and revenue expectations and provided positive Q2 2026 guidance. While insiders sold shares, analysts maintain a "Moderate Buy" rating with an average price target of $189.05.

feed.title: Textron Inc. $TXT Stock Holdings Reduced by QRG Capital Management Inc.
feed.summary: QRG Capital Management Inc. significantly reduced its holdings in Textron Inc. (NYSE:TXT) by 35.6% in the third quarter, while many other institutional investors increased their stakes. Analysts hold a mixed view on Textron, with a consensus "Hold" rating and an average price target of $96.33, despite the company beating Q3 EPS estimates and issuing positive FY2025 guidance. Textron's stock trades with a market capitalization of approximately $16.6 billion, a P/E ratio around 20.7, and offers a modest dividend yield of 0.1%.

feed.title: The Travelers Companies, Inc. $TRV Shares Acquired by Sequoia Financial Advisors LLC
feed.summary: Sequoia Financial Advisors LLC significantly increased its stake in The Travelers Companies (NYSE:TRV) by 87% in Q3, now holding 25,327 shares valued at approximately $7.07 million. While analysts generally rate TRV as a "Hold" with a consensus target price of $299.69, company insiders have been net sellers, divesting over $13 million in shares in the past 90 days. The article also details other hedge fund activity, analyst rating adjustments, and Travelers Companies' financial performance and profile.

feed.title: QRG Capital Management Inc. Sells 9,239 Shares of Motorola Solutions, Inc. $MSI
feed.summary: QRG Capital Management Inc. significantly reduced its stake in Motorola Solutions (NYSE:MSI) by 60.8% in Q3, selling 9,239 shares and retaining 5,964 shares valued at $2.727 million. Motorola Solutions exceeded Q3 EPS and revenue estimates, reporting $4.06 EPS and $3.01 billion in revenue, and subsequently increased its quarterly dividend to $1.21. The stock carries a "Moderate Buy" consensus analyst rating with a target price around $491.86.

feed.title: QRG Capital Management Inc. Has $2.67 Million Stake in Marathon Petroleum Corporation $MPC
feed.summary: QRG Capital Management Inc. significantly reduced its stake in Marathon Petroleum Corporation (NYSE:MPC) by 39.6% in the third quarter, now holding 13,833 shares valued at $2.67 million. Despite analyst ratings coalescing around a "Moderate Buy" with an average target price of $195.71, several other institutional investors modified their positions, some increasing holdings. Marathon Petroleum also increased its quarterly dividend to $1.00 per share, representing a 2.3% yield and a 42.6% payout ratio.

feed.title: Sequoia Financial Advisors LLC Has $5.67 Million Holdings in Duke Energy Corporation $DUK
feed.summary: Sequoia Financial Advisors LLC significantly increased its stake in Duke Energy Corporation by 23.5% in Q3, holding shares valued at $5.67 million. Duke Energy surpassed Q3 earnings expectations with an EPS of $1.81 and reported revenue of $8.54 billion. The company also declared a quarterly dividend of $1.065 per share, representing an annualized yield of approximately 3.6%.

feed.title: Western Midstream renegotiates Occidental contracts, to get $610 million in unit transfer
feed.summary: Western Midstream Partners (WES.N) announced on Tuesday that it has renegotiated its natural gas gathering and processing contracts with Occidental Petroleum (OXY.N) in the Delaware Basin. As a result of this renegotiation, Occidental will transfer 15.3 million Western Midstream common units, valued at approximately $610 million, to Western Midstream. This transfer will reduce Occidental's ownership in Western Midstream to around 40%.

feed.title: QRG Capital Management Inc. Trims Stock Position in Xylem Inc. $XYL
feed.summary: QRG Capital Management Inc. reduced its stake in Xylem Inc. (NYSE:XYL) by 36.2% in the third quarter, selling 9,408 shares and holding 16,614 shares valued at $2.45 million. This divestment occurred amidst other institutional investors adjusting their positions, and notable insider sales by Director Victoria D. Harker and EVP Claudia S. Toussaint. Xylem recently exceeded Q3 earnings and revenue estimates and provided a positive FY2025 outlook, alongside maintaining a quarterly dividend.

feed.title: Johnson & Johnson $JNJ Shares Bought by Pinnacle Financial Partners Inc
feed.summary: Pinnacle Financial Partners Inc increased its stake in Johnson & Johnson (JNJ) by 16% in Q3, making it their 21st largest holding. Johnson & Johnson has received a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating from analysts, with several price target increases. The company also announced a quarterly dividend of $1.30 per share.

feed.title: Anheuser-Busch InBev SA/NV $BUD Shares Sold by Pinnacle Financial Partners Inc
feed.summary: Pinnacle Financial Partners Inc. significantly decreased its stake in Anheuser-Busch InBev SA/NV ($BUD) in the third quarter of 2025, selling 95.9% of its holdings. Despite this, other institutional investors either increased or initiated new positions in the company. Anheuser-Busch InBev reported strong quarterly earnings, beating analyst estimates for EPS, and maintains a "Moderate Buy" rating with an average target price of $77.67 from analysts.

feed.title: Novavax Announces Entering into a License Agreement with Pfizer
feed.summary: Novavax, Inc. (Nasdaq: NVAX) has entered into a non-exclusive license agreement with Pfizer for the use of Novavax's Matrix-M® adjuvant. This agreement grants Pfizer the right to use Matrix-M® in up to two disease areas for its products. Novavax is set to receive an upfront payment of $30 million, with potential additional payments of up to $500 million in development and sales milestones, plus high mid-single digit percentage royalties on product sales incorporating Matrix-M®.

feed.title: Ritholtz Wealth Management Purchases New Stake in Western Digital Corporation $WDC
feed.summary: Ritholtz Wealth Management has acquired a new stake of 6,377 shares in Western Digital Corporation ($WDC), valued at $766,000, during the third quarter. This move is part of a trend where major institutions are increasing their holdings, with 92.51% of WDC now owned by institutional investors. The company recently reported strong quarterly earnings, beating EPS estimates, and has a generally positive outlook from analysts.

feed.title: John Deere named as 2026 Solheim Cup Machinery Partner
feed.summary: John Deere has been officially confirmed as the machinery partner for the 2026 Solheim Cup, which will take place at Bernardus Golf in the Netherlands from September 7-13. The partnership, involving John Deere, Dutch dealer Kraakman, and the host venue, aims to leverage advanced machinery and expertise for world-class course preparation while also contributing to the event's sustainability goals. John Deere's electric and hybrid technologies, along with their cloud-based course management system, will support the Solheim Cup's ambition to set a new benchmark for eco-friendly sporting events.

feed.title: Ethiopian Airlines adds nine Boeing 787s to grow global routes
feed.summary: Ethiopian Airlines has ordered nine Boeing 787-9 Dreamliner airplanes and finalized the purchase of 11 additional 737 MAX jets, totaling 20 new Boeing aircraft. These new 787-9s will be used to expand Ethiopian's long-haul network from Addis Ababa to Europe, Asia, North America, and within Africa, leveraging the 787's 25% fuel and emissions reduction. This order reinforces Ethiopian Airlines' position as operating Africa's largest 787 fleet and holding the continent's largest Boeing backlog.

feed.title: Boeing and Ethiopian Airlines Announce Order for Nine 787 Dreamliners
feed.summary: Boeing and Ethiopian Airlines have announced an order for nine 787 Dreamliner airplanes, specifically the 787-9 jets, to expand the airline's international network. This order, finalized in December 2025 along with 11 737 MAX jets, brings Ethiopian Airlines' total new Boeing aircraft to 20. The 787 Dreamliners are crucial for the airline's strategy to enhance its fleet with modern, fuel-efficient aircraft and serve high-demand routes.

feed.title: US lender KeyCorp beats fourth-quarter profit estimates on higher interest income
feed.summary: KeyCorp surpassed Wall Street's expectations for its fourth-quarter profit, driven by higher interest income and investment banking fees. The U.S. lender reported an adjusted income of $458 million, or 41 cents per share, exceeding analyst estimates of 39 cents per share. This performance comes as regional banks benefit from easing interest rates and strong consumer activity, and despite recent activist investor pressure for the company to focus on buybacks over acquisitions.

feed.title: 3M Earnings Beat Wall Street Expectations. The Stock Drops Anyway.
feed.summary: Despite 3M reporting solid fourth-quarter results that surpassed Wall Street's expectations and showed revenue growth and improved profit margins, the company's stock declined early Tuesday. This drop occurred even after the stock had seen a 19% increase over the past 12 months leading up to Tuesday's trading. The article highlights a paradoxical market reaction to positive financial news.

feed.title: US lender KeyCorp beats fourth-quarter profit estimates on higher interest income
feed.summary: KeyCorp, a US lender, reported better-than-expected profits for the fourth quarter. This positive financial performance was primarily driven by higher interest income. The news was published by Refinitiv and is a quick one-minute read.

feed.title: Trilogy Metals Expands Management Team to Advance Alaskan Mining Projects Following US Government Investment
feed.summary: Trilogy Metals has expanded its management team and is recruiting new key roles to advance its Alaskan Upper Kobuk Mineral Projects, with Egizio Bianchini appointed as Strategic Advisor. This expansion aims to expedite project execution at Ambler Metals and enhances the company's capabilities in investor relations and corporate communications. The move aligns with US federal government investment, emphasizing the development of critical mineral resources and establishing the projects as a key copper production hub.

feed.title: Fastenal Company (FAST) Reports Mixed Q4 2025 Results
feed.summary: Fastenal Company (FAST) reported mixed financial results for Q4 2025, with earnings per share matching estimates at $0.26 but revenue falling slightly short at $2.03 billion compared to a forecast of $2.04 billion. Despite the revenue miss, net sales increased by 11.1% year-over-year, driven by customer contract signings and favorable exchange rates. Looking ahead to 2026, Fastenal plans significant capital investments, including between $310 million and $330 million for infrastructure improvements and technology expansion.

feed.title: Diamondback Energy Earnings Preview: What to Expect
feed.summary: Diamondback Energy (FANG) is expected to announce its fiscal fourth-quarter 2025 earnings on February 23rd, with analysts forecasting a diluted EPS of $2.41, a 33.8% decline from the previous year. Despite consistently beating EPS estimates in prior quarters, FANG's stock has underperformed the S&P 500 and the Energy Select Sector SPDR Fund due to weaker oil pricing and a management focus on debt reduction over output expansion. Analysts hold a bullish view, with a "Strong Buy" rating and a price target suggesting a 19% potential upside.

feed.title: PayPal Introduces Free DIY Tax Filing for PayPal Debit Card Customers
feed.summary: PayPal has partnered with april, an embedded tax technology platform, to offer U.S. PayPal Debit Mastercard customers free DIY tax filing for their 2025 federal and state tax returns. This partnership aims to save customers an estimated $160 in typical tax filing costs and centralizes financial management within PayPal's ecosystem. Additionally, customers can access early tax refunds, earn rewards, and use PayPal Savings for their refunds to boost their financial goals.

feed.title: Novavax Signs License and Option Agreement With Pfizer
feed.summary: Novavax has entered into a non-exclusive, worldwide license and option agreement with Pfizer for its Matrix-M adjuvant technology. Novavax will receive an upfront payment of $30 million, up to $500 million in milestones, and tiered royalties on net sales. Pfizer will handle development, manufacturing, and commercialization, with an option to add a second disease field.

feed.title: KeyCorp announces board changes and stronger quarterly results
feed.summary: KeyCorp announced board changes, nominating former BlackRock executive Antonio DeSpirito and former Truist executive Chris Henson as new independent directors, and appointing Todd Vasos as lead independent director. The company also reported strong fourth-quarter 2025 results, with record revenue of $7.5 billion, increased net income, improved credit quality, and robust fee businesses. KeyCorp repurchased $200 million in common shares and aims for mid-to-high teens returns on tangible common equity, signaling potential for increased capital returns.

feed.title: Klingman & Associates LLC Raises Holdings in Alphabet Inc. $GOOG
feed.summary: Klingman & Associates LLC increased its stake in Alphabet (GOOG) by 14.2% in Q3, now holding 30,459 shares valued at $7.42 million. This comes as Alphabet reported strong Q3 earnings, beating expectations with $2.87 EPS and $102.35 billion in revenue, driven by AI and cloud tailwinds. Despite insider selling, analysts maintain a "Buy" rating with an average price target of $320.31, citing positive sentiment around AI-driven ad revenue and Google Cloud's potential.

feed.title: Bristol Myers Squibb Announces Collaboration With Microsoft To Advance Ai-Driven Early Detection Of Lung Cancer
feed.summary: Bristol Myers Squibb has announced a collaboration with Microsoft to utilize AI for advancing the early detection of lung cancer. This partnership aims to leverage artificial intelligence to improve diagnostic capabilities for the disease. The news was reported by Reuters.

feed.title: Stephens Inc. AR Reduces Holdings in Franklin Resources, Inc. $BEN
feed.summary: Stephens Inc. AR significantly reduced its stake in Franklin Resources, Inc. by 68.5% in the third quarter of last year, selling 39,455 shares and retaining 18,140 shares valued at $420,000. Despite this reduction, Franklin Resources recently increased its quarterly dividend to $0.33 per share, representing a 5.1% yield. The company's latest earnings report showed an EPS beat but missed revenue expectations, leading to an average analyst rating of "Reduce" with a price target of $24.64.

feed.title: The Analyst Verdict: NetApp In The Eyes Of 7 Experts
feed.summary: Seven analysts have recently evaluated NetApp (NASDAQ: NTAP), leading to an average 12-month price target of $121.29, an increase of 2.17% from the previous average. While there are a mix of "Outperform" and "Neutral" ratings, one analyst lowered their rating to "Underweight." NetApp, a provider of enterprise data management solutions, shows strong financial health in net margin, ROE, and ROA, but a high debt-to-equity ratio remains a concern.

feed.title: Nordea Investment Management AB Grows Stock Position in Alphabet Inc. $GOOG
feed.summary: Nordea Investment Management AB increased its stake in Alphabet Inc. (NASDAQ:GOOG) by 5.9% during the third quarter, now owning over 8.16 million shares valued at approximately $1.97 billion, making it their 7th largest holding. This comes as Alphabet reported strong quarterly earnings, beating analyst expectations, and analysts largely maintain a "Buy" rating with an average price target of $320.31, despite some insider selling and ongoing regulatory risks.

feed.title: Alphabet Inc. $GOOG Stock Position Increased by TD Private Client Wealth LLC
feed.summary: TD Private Client Wealth LLC increased its stake in Alphabet Inc. (NASDAQ:GOOG) by 15.7% to 35,805 shares, valued at $8.72 million as of its Q3 SEC filing. Alphabet recently beat Q3 earnings expectations with an EPS of $2.87 and revenue of $102.35 billion, leading to a consensus "Buy" rating and a target of $320.31 from MarketBeat. Despite institutional buying, insiders have been net sellers, offloading 192,687 shares totaling $58.7 million in the last three months.

feed.title: Schmidt P J Investment Management Inc. Sells 4,761 Shares of Alphabet Inc. $GOOG
feed.summary: Schmidt P J Investment Management Inc. reduced its stake in Alphabet Inc. by 4.4% in the third quarter, selling 4,761 shares and retaining 103,068 shares valued at $25.1 million. The firm now holds Alphabet as its fifth-largest position, representing 4.1% of its total holdings. This move comes amidst mixed insider activity and analyst sentiment, with several firms raising price targets due to AI-driven growth while some smaller investors have trimmed positions.

feed.title: The Analyst Verdict: CDW In The Eyes Of 5 Experts
feed.summary: Five analysts have provided diverse ratings for CDW (NASDAQ: CDW), with an average 12-month price target of $168.20, representing a 9.57% decrease from the previous average. Recent analyst actions show adjustments to ratings and price targets, reflecting changing market conditions. CDW, a multi-brand IT solutions provider, exhibits strong financial health with high market capitalization, a 4.0% revenue growth rate, an impressive 5.07% net margin, and robust returns on equity and assets, though it shows a higher debt-to-equity ratio.

feed.title: Merck KGaA: Release according to Article 40, Section 1 of the WpHG [the German Securities Trading Act] with the objective of Europe-wide distribution
feed.summary: Merck KGaA has issued a notification of major holdings according to Article 40, Section 1 of the WpHG, indicating an acquisition/disposal of shares with voting rights and a change in the breakdown of voting rights. BlackRock, Inc. is identified as the legal entity subject to the notification obligation, having crossed a threshold on January 15, 2026. BlackRock's total voting rights in Merck KGaA are reported as 7.18%.

feed.title: Alliance Resource Partners, L.P. Announces Fourth Quarter 2025 Earnings Conference Call
feed.summary: Alliance Resource Partners, L.P. (ARLP) will release its fourth quarter 2025 financial results on Monday, February 2, 2026, before the market opens. The company will host a conference call at 10:00 a.m. Eastern on the same day to discuss the results. Investors can participate by phone or listen to an audio webcast on ARLP's website.

feed.title: Nordea Investment Management AB Takes Position in Tapestry, Inc. $TPR
feed.summary: Nordea Investment Management AB has acquired a new stake of 18,484 shares in Tapestry (NYSE:TPR) worth approximately $2.04 million during Q3. Institutional investors now own about 90.8% of the company's stock. Tapestry surpassed Q3 earnings expectations and provided strong FY2026 guidance, while also authorizing a $1 billion share buyback and paying a $0.40 quarterly dividend.

feed.title: Skip $160 tax prep fees: PayPal debit users get free 2025 filing
feed.summary: PayPal has partnered with april to offer free federal and state tax filing for 2025 to its U.S. Debit Mastercard customers, potentially saving them around $160. This service aims to streamline the tax process, with an average filing time of under 20 minutes, pre-filled data, and features like early federal refunds and various payment/reward options. The initiative is part of PayPal's broader strategy to expand its financial services and deepen user engagement.

feed.title: AmpliTech 5G radio earns O-RAN badge for busy city networks
feed.summary: AmpliTech Group (NASDAQ: AMPG) announced its 64T64R Massive MIMO 5G radio has achieved O-RAN Alliance conformance certification, making it the first U.S.-based company to do so. This certification verifies the radio's interoperability and alignment with O-RAN technical specifications for multi-vendor 5G deployments in dense environments, supporting high-capacity networks in urban centers, transportation hubs, and other high-traffic areas. The radio is certified for 5G NR Band n78 with up to 100 MHz carrier bandwidth and TDD operation.

feed.title: Bristol Myers Squibb Announces Collaboration with Microsoft to Advance AI-Driven Early Detection of Lung Cancer
feed.summary: Bristol Myers Squibb and Microsoft have partnered to leverage AI for the early detection of lung cancer, deploying U.S. FDA-cleared radiology AI algorithms via Microsoft’s Precision Imaging Network. This collaboration aims to assist radiologists in identifying lung disease and hard-to-detect lung nodules, potentially leading to earlier patient identification and more equitable care, especially in medically underserved communities. The initiative seeks to improve operational efficiency and patient outcomes by streamlining patient tracking and connecting them to optimal care pathways and precision therapies.
